title: cirsium × breviscapum
intro: Cirsium × breviscapum, also known as the thistle spurge or thistle, is a hybrid plant species within the thistle genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids, sesquiterpenoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Cirsium × breviscapum include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation, protecting against oxidative stress, and potentially inhibiting the growth of cancer cells. Herbal preparations of Cirsium × breviscapum can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support cardiovascular health and immune function.
